title: Iraq Taps Businessman, Ali al-Zaidi, to Form New Government
summary_full: After months of tensions and pressure from both the U.S. and Iran, Ali al-Zaidi, a businessman, was named as prime minister-designate.
summary_public: After months of tensions and pressure from both the U.S. and Iran, Ali al-Zaidi, a businessman, was named as prime minister-designate.
